_doc.source: Captured 2026-05-17 via window.addElem__getDefaultParametersByElementType() in Tilda Zero Block editor.
_doc.common_fields: Every element MUST have: elem_id (unique string, usually Date.now()), elem_type, top, left, width, height, leftunits/topunits/widthunits/heightunits (default 'px'), zindex, hidden ('n' or 'y'). Animation fields are optional: animstyle (fadein|fadeinup|fadeindown|fadeinleft|fadeinright|zoomin), animduration (sec), animdelay (sec), animdistance (px), animscale (0-1), animtriggeroffset (px).
_doc.important: Tilda IGNORES unknown fields silently. Field NAMES matter: button text is 'caption' (NOT 'text'); button link is 'link' (NOT 'href' or 'url').
_doc.artboard_fields: Top-level keys on the ZB JSON (not inside any element): ab_height, ab_bgcolor, ab_filteropacity (0-1), ab_filteropacity2 (0-1), ab_bgattachment (scroll|fixed), ab_bgposition (e.g. 'center center'), ab_valign (top|center|bottom), ab_upscale ('grid'|'shape'|'all'|'none'), groups: [], timestamp: <ms>, meta: { feeds: {} }.

text._doc: Plain rich-text element. Renders as a <div class='tn-atom'> with text inside.

fields.text:
string — visible text. Supports basic
,  , but mostly plain.

button._doc: Clickable button. CRITICAL: text field is 'caption', NOT 'text'. Link field is 'link', NOT 'href'.

fields.caption: string — button label (e.g. 'LET\'S GO!')
fields.link: URL the button navigates to. For popup: '#popup:tNNNN_<recordid>' where NNNN is the popup T-code (e.g. 1093) and recordid is the popup block's id from add_block.
fields.borderradius: e.g. '30 30 30 30' (top-left top-right bottom-right bottom-left, all px)

fields.layer: optional label for ZB layers panel

image._doc: Static image. width/height drive bounding box; imagefit controls aspect.

fields.img: URL — typically static.tildacdn.com/... after upload, but external URLs work

form._doc: Subscribe / contact form inside a Zero Block. 'inputs' is a STRINGIFIED JSON array of field objects.

fields.inputs: STRINGIFIED JSON array of { lid (number), ls ('10'|'20'), loff, li_type ('em'|'nm'|'ph'|'adr'|'cl'|'tx'), li_name (POST name), li_title (label), li_ph (placeholder), li_nm }

tooltip._doc: Hover/click tooltip — an icon that reveals a text bubble.

gallery._doc: Image slideshow. 'imgs' is a STRINGIFIED JSON array.

fields.imgs: STRINGIFIED JSON array of { lid, li_img (URL), li_imgalt, li_imgtitle, li_youtube, li_vimeo, li_imgurl, li_imgtarget (bool), li_imgnofollow (bool) }

fields.vectorjson: Tilda's internal path representation (only needed for editing in Tilda UI; omit for one-shot import)
